use_cases: Custom cursor replacement for creative portfolios and branding sites
Interactive cursor state tracking with smooth spring animations
Context-based cursor behavior for enhanced user feedback
Branded cursor experiences for marketing and landing pages
ai_summary: A custom cursor component system with React Context provider, featuring smooth spring-physics animations using motion/react. The component tracks mouse position relative to a container, manages cursor state (active/inactive), and applies CSS positioning with dynamic styling for an interactive cursor overlay experience.
